text:
There was an old man named Harold. Harold loved books. Every weekend Harold would burrow into one volume after another. Harold loved stories.

One day Harold read that everyone loves a hero.

Harold decided to go out into the world.

On his first adventure Harold stumbled over a burdock.

Ow!

He scraped an ear.

Then Harold sat down quiet for a bit. Birds sang.

Then an old lady came out.

Oh dear!

But she saw him.

She smiled.

Then she said:

Oh dear boy.

You shouldnvo't eat those little things.

Oh:

You'll ruin your hearing.

You'll get holes.

Harold thought...

Maybe there wasn't anything interesting anymore.

Maybe he should read another book?

However...

It sounded boring.

Even worse...

Maybe...

There wasn{oataOl.O}?That sounded silly. Perhaps...

Perhaps...

It might even be interesting.

So Harold read.

And read.

And read.

And...

Oh wow.

What an adventure.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
